queries.question: Which studio made each production? Split by movie
queries.sql: SELECT a.title, b.name FROM Movie a JOIN Studio b ON a.studio_id = b.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Studio .
  ?a p:hasStudio ?b .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: What were the comments split by movies and their productions?
queries.sql: SELECT a.title, b.comments, c.name FROM Movie a JOIN Review b ON a.id = b.movie_id JOIN Studio c ON c.id = a.studio_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?comments ?name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Review .
  ?b p:hasMovie ?a .
  ?c a :Studio .
  ?a p:hasStudio ?c .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:comments ?comments .
  ?c p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: What were the comments split by movies and their productions?
queries.sql: SELECT a.title, b.comments, c.Full_name FROM Movie a JOIN Review b ON a.id = b.movie_id JOIN Producer c ON c.id = a.producer_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?comments ?full_name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Review .
  ?b p:hasMovie ?a .
  ?c a :Producers .
  ?a p:hasProducer ?c .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:comments ?comments .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
}

queries.question: What were the comments split by movies and their productions?
queries.sql: SELECT a.title, b.comments, c.name, p.full_name FROM Movie a JOIN Review b ON a.id = b.movie_id JOIN Studio c ON c.id = a.studio_id JOIN Producer p ON p.id = a.producer_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?comments ?name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Review .
  ?b p:hasMovie ?a .
  ?c a :Studio .
  ?a p:hasStudio ?c .
  ?p a :Producers .
  ?a p:hasProducer ?p .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:comments ?comments .
  ?c p:name ?name .
  ?p p:name ?full_name .
}

queries.question: Which studio and producer made each production? Split by movie
queries.sql: SELECT a.title, c.name, p.full_name FROM Movie a JOIN Studio c ON a.studio_id = c.id JOIN Producer p ON p.id = a.producer_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?c a :Studio .
  ?a p:hasStudio ?c .
  ?p a :Producers .
  ?a p:hasProducer ?p .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?c p:name ?name .
  ?p p:name ?full_name .
}

queries.sql: SELECT a.title, c.Full_name FROM Movie a JOIN Producer c ON a.producer_id = c.id
queries.sparql:

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who made each production? Split by movie
What were the comments split by movies and their productions?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?title ?comments ?name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Review .
  ?b p:hasMovie ?a .
  ?c a :Studio .
  ?a p:hasStudio ?c .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:comments ?comments .
  ?c p:name ?name .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?title ?comments ?name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Review .
  ?b p:hasMovie ?a .
  ?c a :Studio .
  ?a p:hasStudio ?c .
  ?p a :Producers .
  ?a p:hasProducer ?p .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:comments ?comments .
  ?c p:name ?name .
  ?p p:name ?full_name .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title ?comments ?full_name WHERE {
  ?a a :Movies .
  ?b a :Review .
  ?b p:hasMovie ?a .
  ?c a :Producers .
  ?a p:hasProducer ?c .
  ?a p:title ?title .
  ?b p:comments ?comments .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
} }
}
